_templateName: AI Video Summarization with VLM Run - Automated Content Analysis for Teams
_templateDescription:
This workflow contains community nodes that are only compatible with the self-hosted version of n8n. 

Automatically transform your video uploads into AI-powered summaries with key topic extraction and instant team notifications.

What this workflow does

Monitors Google Drive for new video uploads
Downloads and processes videos using VLM Run AI
Generates intelligent summaries with key topics extracted
Posts results to Slack for immediate team access

Setup

Prerequisites: Google Drive account, VLM Run API credentials, Slack workspace, self-hosted n8n.

You need to install VLM Run community node

Quick Setup:
Configure Google Drive OAuth2 and create video upload folder
Add VLM Run API credentials
Set up Slack integration for notifications
Update folder/channel IDs in workflow nodes
Test and activate

Perfect for

Meeting recordings and training videos
Webinar summaries and educational content
Content analysis and team collaboration
Any video content requiring quick insights

Key Benefits

Asynchronous processing** handles large files without timeouts
Multi-format support** for MP4, AVI, MOV, WebM, MKV
Instant team updates** via Slack notifications
Saves hours** of manual video review time

How to customize

Extend by adding:
Video categorization and tagging
Integration with project management tools
Email notifications alongside Slack
Searchable video databases with summaries

This workflow transforms lengthy videos into actionable insights, making your content instantly accessible and shareable with your team.

parameters.content:
## 🎥 AI Video Summarization with VLM Run

**Overview:**
Automatically processes videos uploaded to Google Drive and generates AI-powered summaries with key topic extraction.

**Workflow:**
1. 📁 Monitor Google Drive folder
2. ⬇️ Download new video files
3. 🤖 Processes video asynchronously using VLM Run node
4. 🔗 Receive summary via webhook
5. 💬 Post results to Slack


**Perfect for:**
- Meeting recordings
- Training videos
- Webinar summaries
- Content analysis
- Educational materials


**Requirements:**
- VLM Run API access
- Google Drive OAuth2
- Slack webhook
- Webhook endpoint

## 📁 Video Input Processing

**Monitors Google Drive folder and downloads videos for AI analysis.**

**Process:**
1. Watches for new video files
2. Auto-triggers on upload
3. Downloads for processing


**Supported Formats:**
- MP4, AVI, MOV
- WebM, MKV
- Various resolutions
- Mobile recordings

## 🤖 AI Video Analysis

**VLM Run processes videos to extract summaries and topics.**

**Features:**
- Content summarization
- Key topic extraction
- Asynchronous processing
- Large file support


**Output:**
- Concise summary
- Main topics covered
- Structured data


**Benefits:**
- Saves review time
- Identifies key points
- Searchable content
- Team collaboration

## 🔗 Async Processing Flow

**How asynchronous processing works:**

**Step 1:** Video sent to VLM Run with a callback URL
**Step 2:** Processing starts in background
**Step 3:** Webhook receives completion
**Step 4:** Results posted to Slack


**Why Async?**
- Handles large video files
- Prevents timeouts
- Better resource usage
- Reliable processing

## 💬 Team Notifications

**Delivers AI summaries to Slack for team collaboration.**

**Notification includes:**
- Video summary
- Key topics

**Benefits:**
- Instant team updates
- Centralized summaries

nodes.name: VLM Run Video Summarizer
nodes.notes: Processes video files using VLM AI to generate intelligent summaries and extract key topics. Runs asynchronously for large files.

nodes.name: Monitor Video Uploads
nodes.notes: Watches designated Google Drive folder for new video uploads and triggers processing automatically.

nodes.name: Download Video File
nodes.notes: Downloads the uploaded video file from Google Drive and prepares it for AI analysis.

nodes.name: Receive VLM Run Callback
nodes.notes: Receives the completed video summary from VLM AI when asynchronous processing is finished.

nodes.name: Send Summary to Team
nodes.notes: Posts the AI-generated video summary and key topics to Slack channel for team review.
